description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, mingw, and staging, and a global before_script that runs `git submodule sync --recursive`, `git submodule update --init --recursive`, `apt-get update -qy`, and installs python-dev, python-pip, python3-dev, python3-pip, python-numpy, python3-numpy, g++ and make. In the mingw stage add a mingw job that installs `mingw-w64` and `mingw-w64-x86-64-dev` via apt-get and then executes `bash recompile.sh --mingw`. In the staging stage add a staging job that runs `bash recompile.sh --profile`, then `getconf _NPROCESSORS_ONLN`, and finally `./apgluxe -v 50 -k '#gitlab' -i 1 -n 1000000`. In the test stage add a test job that runs `bash recompile.sh --symmetry 'gitlab_stdin_test'`, pipes `test/minstrels.rle` into `./apgluxe -L 1 -t 1 -s 'test_seed'`, aggregates output with `cat *.test_seed.txt | tr ' ' '\n' | grep xq6 | sort | uniq > sortedships.txt`, and checks the result with `sha256sum sortedships.txt | grep b0a11c658`. No specific Docker image, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
